execution.planTitle: ADR: Add pagination to list endpoint
execution.changeSummary: Added pagination utility and applied it to the GET /list endpoint. Created pagination.ts with offset/limit helpers and modified list.ts to use them.

patches.justification: Step 1: Create pagination utility with safe defaults and bounds checking.
Step 2: Apply pagination to GET /list endpoint using the new utility.
